product: Lakeflow Designer will soon be available by default for workspaces with the…
tagline: Lakeflow Designer will be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in late July 2026.
what_it_does: Lakeflow Designer will be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in late July 2026. Lakeflow Designer is a visual, no code experience for preparing and transforming data on a drag and drop canvas, with all workflows backed by production ready code governed by Unity Catalog. Lakeflow Designer is a visual, no code, AI native experience for data preparation and analytics.
why_it_matters: Lakeflow Designer is a visual, no code experience for preparing and transforming data on a drag and drop canvas, with all workflows backed by production ready code governed by Unity Catalog.
